decisions.title_en: Cognition raises $1B at $26B valuation; Devin ARR jumped from $37M to $492M YoY
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Major AI coding agent funding announced May 27 — round co-led by Lux/General Catalyst/8VC; ARR grew 13x in 12 months; valuation more than doubled from Sept 2025 $10B.

decisions.title_en: SK Hynix joins $1 trillion market cap club on AI memory chip rally
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. SK Hynix shares jumped 11% on May 27 crossing $1T; third Asian company after Samsung and Micron; 2026 HBM capacity already sold out. Note: hyperscaler-debt-cds-boom (5-23) is a different story (debt/CDS angle).

decisions.title_en: Huang announces Nvidia $150B/year Taiwan capex, 10x current spend; HQ groundbreaking at Beitou T17/T18
decisions.reason: Previously published 5-23 (Huang arrival) and 5-27 (T17/T18 groundbreaking ceremony, mayor attendance). NEW INFO: official capex figures — $150B/year vs current $10-15B (10x); 4,000 employees, 2030 completion; 'epicenter of AI revolution' language. The prior 5-27 entry was the morning groundbreaking; this is the afternoon/evening capex disclosure with hard numbers.

decisions.title_en: China expands overseas travel restrictions to top AI talent at DeepSeek, Alibaba private firms
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Bloomberg 5-26 exclusive: China extends travel curbs (previously for nuclear scientists & SOE execs) to top private-sector AI talent at Alibaba and DeepSeek; founders/senior researchers need government approval. Major geopolitical escalation.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic Mythos data update: 23,019 candidate vulnerabilities, 1,726 confirmed; wolfSSL CVE-2026-5194 disclosed
decisions.reason: Previously published 5-22 with '10,000+ H/C vulnerabilities' headline figure. NEW INFO: revised total to 23,019 candidate findings; 1,726 externally validated by partners (90.8% true positive rate); first major CVE disclosed publicly (CVE-2026-5194 critical wolfSSL crypto flaw); 1,596 vulnerabilities disclosed across 281 OSS projects; 97 patched.

decisions.title_en: Samsung union ratification vote on $400K chip worker bonuses ended amid shareholder lawsuit
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Samsung union vote on memory worker $400K bonuses ended 10am May 27; Korea Shareholder Action Headquarters threatened lawsuit; non-chip employees seek injunction over $4K/$400K disparity; reports of intentional production slowdowns affecting HBM delivery.

decisions.title_en: Gemini Interactions API new schema becomes default May 26; legacy outputs array removed June 8
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Major dev-facing breaking change live May 26: new steps array replaces outputs array; new polymorphic response_format consolidates output controls; legacy schema removed June 8. Supports future mid-flight steering and async tool calls.

decisions.title_en: Demis Hassabis Axios post-IO: 2029 now possible for AGI, 'foothills of singularity', few years to prepare
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Axios 5-26 follow-up interview with Hassabis after his Google I/O 'foothills of the singularity' keynote: he revised AGI timeline from 2030 to 2029-2030; says provocative language was intentional to alarm policymakers and economists; 'only a few years left to prepare for AGI'.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft Copilot Studio May 2026 update: broader CUA GA, workflows experience, real-time voice
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Microsoft May 2026 update post on 5-26 expands computer-using agents GA (initially 5-13) to broader commercial Power Platform geos with credential management, model selection, resilient automations; adds new workflows experience and real-time voice for Copilot Agents.

decisions.title_en: MIT researcher warns AI-generated pro se lawsuits could swamp US courts; 18% of 2026 federal filings contain AI text
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. MIT researcher warning + Bloomberg Law analysis 5-25: pro se filings rose from 11% to 16.8%, docket activity up 158%; sample shows 18%+ of 2026 federal complaints contain AI text; pro se employment filings +49% YoY; FHA filings +69% YoY; Miami-Dade and Broward courts issued coordinated AI disclosure requirements in May 2026.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic $30B+ round expected to close this week at $900B+ valuation
decisions.reason: Already published 5-22 with title 'Anthropic $30B+ 新轮下周敲定 $900B+ 估值' which already covered the lead investors, round size, and 'next week' close timeline. No confirmed official-close announcement from Anthropic itself this week; only third-party blog claims of closure. No substantive new information beyond what 5-22 already disclosed.
event_date 2025-12-11 is 168 days old. Originally announced Dec 2025, terminated March 2026 — both events are historical.
